context.goal: Increase prediction confidence and accuracy by expanding data coverage, enriching features, and strengthening model calibration for Phase 2 Lite.
context.current_state: Phase 2 Lite v4.1 operates on official API feeds with weather, injuries, and form analysis but lacks deep historical data fusion and secondary market insights.

strategic_themes.name: Data Acquisition Expansion
strategic_themes.objective: Broaden data inputs with historical depth and alternative sources to reduce information gaps.
suggestions: Extend football-data.org pulls to include multiple past seasons and cache snapshots.
Integrate secondary APIs (Sportradar, The Odds API, open xG providers) for odds, xG, and advanced stats.
Implement controlled BeautifulSoup scrapers for lineup rumors, local injury news, and referee assignments with throttling and caching.
Capture historical weather by venue to compare forecast vs. typical conditions.

strategic_themes.name: Feature Engineering & Storage
strategic_themes.objective: Transform raw feeds into reusable features that capture form, momentum, and matchup nuances.
suggestions: Build an offline feature job to compute rolling ELO, Poisson parameters, and streak scores from historical data.
Derive matchup payloads such as rest differential, travel distance, referee bias history, and venue-specific goal expectations.
Persist engineered features into Parquet/SQLite tables for fast match-day loading.
Version feature sets and document schema changes in feature catalogue.

strategic_themes.name: Model & Confidence Enhancements
strategic_themes.objective: Strengthen Phase 2 Lite ensembles and calibration for more trustworthy probabilities.
suggestions: Blend multiple predictive models (Poisson, gradient boosting, Bayesian) with league-specific weights.
Introduce empirical calibration using past predictions vs. outcomes (isotonic/logistic).
Add reliability metrics such as confidence intervals, data freshness scores, and disagreement indicators.
Automate backtests per league to monitor hit rates and recalibrate thresholds quarterly.

strategic_themes.name: Reporting & UX Improvements
strategic_themes.objective: Expose richer insights on prediction cards and summaries without sacrificing clarity.
suggestions: Add last-five head-to-head outcomes, xG trends, and form charts to the PNG card.
Highlight key drivers (injury advantage, travel fatigue, odds alignment) with iconography.
Display scenario analysis for critical player absences and weather shifts.
Ensure markdown summaries remain lint-clean and support expandable sections in dashboards.

strategic_themes.name: Infrastructure & Quality
strategic_themes.objective: Guarantee resilient data pipelines, reproducibility, and observability.
suggestions: Schedule nightly data pulls and feature recomputation using cron or GitHub Actions.
Implement caching with TTLs and source metadata to prevent API rate limits.
Add validation tests for new feeds (schema checks, anomaly detection).
Enhance logging/alerts for failed scrapes or stale data conditions.

work_packages.title: Historical Data Harvest
work_packages.description: Pull and store multi-season fixture/results data with weather snapshots and odds history.

work_packages.title: Secondary Source Integration
work_packages.description: Add secondary APIs and curated scrapers for xG, odds, and lineup intel with caching/ratelimiting.

work_packages.title: Feature Store & Documentation
work_packages.description: Engineer rolling features, persist to Parquet/SQLite, and document schemas in docs/feature_catalog.md.

work_packages.title: Phase 2 Lite Ensemble Upgrade
work_packages.description: Refine model stacking, apply calibration, and emit reliability metrics to prediction outputs.

work_packages.title: Reporting Enhancements
work_packages.description: Upgrade summary markdown and PNG cards to show new metrics, badges, and scenario insights.

work_packages.title: Pipeline Reliability & Monitoring
work_packages.description: Implement scheduling, caching, validation suites, and alerting for ingestion pipelines.

milestones.name: M1 - Data Foundation
success_criteria: Historical datasets stored for target leagues
Secondary sources authenticated and rate-limit safe

milestones.name: M2 - Feature & Model Upgrade
success_criteria: Calibrated Phase 2 Lite probabilities within +/-5% of validation

milestones.name: M3 - Enhanced Reporting Release
success_criteria: Markdown reports pass lint with expanded insights

risk_register.risk: API rate limits or data licensing restrictions
risk_register.mitigation: Implement caching, staggered scheduling, and monitor usage; negotiate higher tiers if required.
Add schema validation tests, maintain source-specific parsers, and fall back to cached data.

risk_register.risk: Calibration drift due to league dynamics
risk_register.mitigation: Schedule recurring backtests and recalibration, track performance metrics per league.

next_actions: Review and prioritize work packages with stakeholders.
Establish API keys/credentials for secondary sources and update .env/.secrets handling.
Prototype historical ingestion (WP1) to validate storage design before expanding scope.
